title: mesua ferrea var. coromandeliana
intro: Mesua ferrea var. coromandeliana, also known as the Indian staff tree, is a variant of the Mesua ferrea tree, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mesua ferrea var. coromandeliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Mesua ferrea var. coromandeliana is typically used in herbal preparations like decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are made by boiling the plant's bark or leaves in water or mixing them with other herbs.
